allow: PowerShell($body = '{"titre":"Test Compet","date":"2026-07-01","heureDebut":"10:00:00","duree":60,"niveauCible":3,"enseignantId":4}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/competitions" -ContentType "application/json" -Headers @{"X-Role"="PRESIDENT"} -Body $body; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })
